query:
-- Get billing items assigned to these 7 services
SELECT 
  sba.serviceExternalId,
  bi.externalId as billingItemId,
  bi.description,
  bi.lineAmount,
  bi.invoiceNumber,
  bi.billingPlatform,
  MAX(c.name) as customerName
FROM service_billing_assignments sba
JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
JOIN services s ON s.externalId = sba.serviceExternalId
JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE sba.serviceExternalId IN ('S0753','S0832','S0966','S1315','S1416','S1454','S1560')
GROUP BY sba.serviceExternalId, bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.invoiceNumber, bi.billingPlatform;
